Fixture 4: Resume (Retry #2)
- Scenario: Resuming after pause, retry count > 0
- Invocation: build_prompt(2, "./prd.md", 3)
- Expected Behavior: Resume message, ledger context injection, prior context
- Key Variables:
  - context_injection: Present (from ledger)
  - memory_context_section: Present (wrapped around context_injection)
  - Resume text: "Resume iteration #3 (retry #2). PRD: ./prd.md"
- Test: Verify "Resume iteration" message appears and ledger context injected
